name: issue-005-brute-force-defense
description: ISSUE-005 spike: prove the external Super-Admin password+2FA login withstands a scripted credential-stuffing / brute-force attack. Supabase provides NO native per-account lockout — this red-teams the app-layer per-account soft-lock + 2FA soft-lock + CAPTCHA + leaked-password protection against a single-account AND a distributed multi-IP attack (AF-077 gate). See ../../spec/06-issues/ISSUE-005-brute-force-spike.md
